titleStmt.title: SII 28.66: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 66. (A.R. No. 65 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, north base of the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartti Kulōttuṅga (III) Year 11, Vṛīśchika, ba. 14 Friday, Anusham = 1188 A.D. November 18, f.d.t. 42 f.d.n. .78.

summary.p: States that as per order, dated year 9+1 of Periya-dēvar Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-dēvar, a bloc of land of 5 vēli extent was separated with the name Śivapādaśēkhara-maṅgalam, from Kaṇṇapuram, a brahmadēyam, after excluding the land that was iṟai-ili (tax-free) and under enjoyment of Paḻamperuṁ-Kaṇṇaputtāṉ and made dēvadāna-iṟai-ili in favour of God Tiruvirāmanantīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Tirukkaṇṇapuram, a brahmadēyam in Marukal-nāḍu in Geyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu. As the temple of this God was not built in stone there was difficulty in preserving the record by inscribing, the tānattār of the temple talked to Kaḍuvaṅguḍaiyār Tulaiyāda-chelvar alias Chōḻakōṉār who had the paṟṟu of this temple (Uttarāpatīśvaramuḍaiyār temple) and the record was arranged to be inscribed in the eastern tiru-maṇḍapa of the temple. The temples of God Tiruvirāmanantīśvaram uḍaiyār was also probably renovated in the year 9+1 of Periya-dēvar Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-dēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. puyal vāy
ttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta
nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāyppat
tirumakaḷum ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vā
ḻi veṇmati poṟkuṭai viḷaṅka ve
l ventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉa
ṅkaḷippa maṉunīti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramu
1) The details also correspond regularly to 1185 A.D., November 22, ·85; -99. L.D.S. Pillai surmises that the regnal year inscribed was a mistake for 22 (A.R. Ep., 1914, p. 59).

ñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuṭ ceya naṭappa
k kaṟpakālam puvikāppap poṟpamainta muṭi
puṉaintu vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ veṇṭa viṭṭa ta
ṇṭāl vīrapāṇṭiyaṉ maintaṉai mukkarintu ko
ṇṭu vikkirama pāṇṭiyaṟkuk kūṭal māṉa
kar kuṭuttu miṇṭa piṉṉeṭuttu vanta paripava
ttāle tirntu vanta virapāṇṭiyaṉai muṭi
ttalai koṇṭa māmuṭittu muṭivu ceyattam
pa nāṭṭi vākaip peruvīrakkoṭiyun tiyākak
koṭiyumeṭuttaruḷic cempoṉ vīrasidaṅṅāsa
ṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu vīṟṟirun
taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ maturaikoṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭi
ttalai koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu
10varuṣam miruccika ṉāyaṟṟu A
parapakṣattu caturtte
ciyum veḷḷikkiḻamai
yum peṟṟa Aṉiḻatti ṉāḷ
keya māṇikka vaḷaṉāṭṭu marukal
ṉāṭṭu birahmateyan tirukkaṇṇa
purattu Uṭaiyār tiruvirāmanan
tīśvaramuṭaiyārkkup periya
tevar kulottuṅkacoḻa te
varkku �vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu pira
sādañ ceytaruḷi vanta tirumu
kamu Uḷvarippaṭi Ivvūril muṉpu
Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum pūrvvasthāṉat
tile Eḻuntaruḷivittu Ittevar
kku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku I
ṟuppatākak kaṇṇapurattāṉ Iṟai
yili brahmadecaṅ kaṇṇapurattup
paḻam peruṅkaṇṇapurattāṉukku I
ṟaiyiliyāka varukiṟapaṭiyun ta
virttu Oṉpatāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mu
tal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
yāy veṟu piṟinta civapātaceka
ramaṅkalam rūpāy 5liyum Aivveli
yum pūrvvasthānamāy Eḻuntaruḷuvit
tu Ivvaṭattaic cūḻ śrīkoyilun tiru
muṟṟamun tīrttak kuḷamun tirumaṭaviḷākamun
tirunantavaṉamumāka Ivvūr niṅkalil Iṭṭa
rūpāy (1/4) Iṉṉilaṅkālum Āka rūpāy 5(1/4) Itil It
tevar śrīkoyilun tirumuṟṟamun tiruma
ṭaviḷākamun tirttakkuḷamun tirunantavaṉa
mumāka Ivvūr nīṅkal nilattu Iṭṭa nilamāy
nīṅkaluk kuṭalāka nīkkiṉa rūpāy (1/4) nīkki nilam
Aiyveliyiṉāl nilavopāti paḻa Iṟai pon_ 2 100 10
�m niccayitta Opāti pon_ 10000 3 1000 6 100 3 10 5m
Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ ḷa5 100ḷaṉāl 10 6 Āk
ki ḷa5 1000 3 100ḷam 9 Etirāmāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa I
ṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Innilam paṭumaṭa
ttu Uḷḷaṉavaḷakkak kuṟainta nilam taramili
nilattopātikku nīkki nīkki niṉṟa nilam
nilavopātikku Opātiyeṟāmey Okkattarattu
5(1/4) Itaṉ
ttu mukaveṭṭi neṭu
maramuṭaiyārum veḷūr varu
raicūruṭaiyārum
ruṭaiyārum
māṉa ḻār
ṟṟūruṭaiyarum ciṅkaḷarāyarum
Uḷvariyuṇṭāy Ivai paḻa Icciḷi
ttu I rakṣikkai Aritāyirukkaiyi
l Ip kalveṭṭa Iṉṉāyanār ko
yiṟ tirukkaṟṟaḷiyillāmaiyil Iṉṉāṭ
ṭu marukal nāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭi Uṭai
yār koyiṟ tirukkaṟṟaḷiyiley kalveṭṭap peṟa
veṇumeṉṟu Ittiruvirāmaṉantīśvaramuṭaiyār ko
yiṟ tāṉattār Ikkoyil paṟṟuppiṭitta kaṭuvaṉ
kuṭaiyār tulaiyāta celvarāṉa coḻakoṉārkkuc
colli Ivar Olai tiruvarattik kiḻttirumaṇṭapat
tey kalveṭṭik kuṭuppateṉṟu vantamaiyāl
yāṇṭu patinoṉṟāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟeḻupattaiñciṉāṟ kalveṭṭittu .
Digital edition of SII 28.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
